name: Receive OSC in a Function node and map to two KNX DPTs
info:
Prerequisites:
1) In Node-RED settings.js set functionExternalModules: true and restart Node-RED.
2) Deploy this flow: Node-RED will install node-osc for this Function node.

OSC mappings handled by the Function node:
- /knx/switch <value>  -> KNX Device DPT 1.001 (true/false)
- /knx/value <value>   -> KNX Device DPT 5.001 (0..255 integer)

Example OSC values:
- /knx/switch 1
- /knx/switch false
- /knx/value 120

name: OSC Receiver (node-osc)
func:
// Input messages are ignored: this node emits only from the OSC callback defined in Setup.
return null;
